---
title: "Welcome!"
---

## My name is Hailey, and I am a graduate student of Computational Social Science.

### This website showcases several of my data visualization projects.

- This ["scrollytelling" document](tornado_scrolly.html) walks through trends in tornado exposure decade-by-decade, serving as an accessible supplement to my thesis project.

- This [Shiny app](shiny_app.html) interactively explores annual trends in tornado exposure, giving the user more control over which years and counties to focus on than the scrollytelling document does.

- This [Tableau dashboard](tableau.html) is just for fun, exploring the history of different variations of spelling of my name in the US.

### I hope you enjoy interacting with these visualizations as much as I enjoyed making them!
